## Checklist

- [ ] Code compiles: `cd core && zig build`
- [ ] Tests pass: `cd core && zig build test`
- [ ] TypeScript compiles: `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (if user-facing)
- [ ] Tested locally with `omni distill` / `omni report`
